title: (Bullish Signal) FDX, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling FDX's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I. dvisor identified 43 similar cases where FDX's MACD histogram became positive, and 33 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 77%. Current price $287.44 is above $275.95 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 10/16/20 - 11/17/20, the price experienced a +0.42% Uptrend. During the week of 11/10/20 - 11/17/20, the stock enjoyed a +7% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/w8rmsu9er1061.png?width=1528&format=png&auto=webp&s=08d36912f2f41272cf173622545b0f1fb9c24419

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on November 11, 2020. You may want to consider a long position or call options on FDX as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 54 of 77 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 70%.

Following a +4.83% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where FDX advanced for three days, in 232 of 367 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 63%.

FDX may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 172 of 312 cases where FDX Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 55%.
